text:
(In reply to Piotr Smyrak from comment #11)
Adding devel/appstream to BUILD_DEPENDS fixed the remaining issue on Poudriere build.
(Patch uploaded).

Not yet installed, as I need to wait the whole bunch of builds on Poudriere finished, but limiting with graphics/gthumb, build succeeded.
